# AI Aging Simulation

## Overview
AI aging generator utilizing generative AI model to generate a series of photos from youth to age from a single selfie image. With the help of AI technology, not only can it measure your current age, but it also lets you see yourself in the future or the past.

![AI Aging Generator](https://bcw-media.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/f42f1504_79e3_461c_a3f1_a254623d113b_b068736afb.jpg "AI Aging Generator")

The AI aging generator can generate a series of photos based on one single input selfie image. A sample generated photos are shown below as a quick reference of this feature.
![AI Aging Generator](https://bcw-media.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/U_2024_04_17_cr_12112b83e2.png "AI Aging Generator")


### File Specs & Errors
* Supported Formats & Dimensions

| AI Feature | Supported Dimensions | Supported File Size | Supported Formats |
| ---- | ---- | ----  | ---- |
| AI Aging | long side <= 4096, single person only. Face pose constraints: yaw within ±30°, roll within ±20°, and pitch within ±20°. | < 10MB | jpg/jpeg |

* Error Codes

|Error Code|Description|
|  ----  | ----  |
| error_below_min_image_size | Source image dimensions must be at least 320 pixels. |
| error_face_position_invalid | Face must be fully visible, forward-facing, and centered in the image. |
| error_face_position_too_small | Detected face is too small for analysis. |
| error_face_position_out_of_boundary | Face extends beyond image boundaries. |
| error_face_not_forward_facing | Face must be directly facing the camera. |
| error_face_angle_upward | Face is angled too far upward—slightly tilt head down. |
| error_face_angle_downward | Face is angled too far downward — slightly tilt head up. |
| error_face_angle_leftward | Face is turned too far left — slightly rotate head right. |
| error_face_angle_rightward | Face is turned too far right — slightly rotate head left. |
| error_face_angle_left_tilt | Face is tilted too far left — gently tilt head right. |
| error_face_angle_right_tilt | Face is tilted too far right — gently tilt head left. |

## Reference

- **API version:** V1.0
- **OpenAPI version:** 3.0.0
- **Source:** [OpenAPI description](https://docs.perfectcorp.com/_bundle/reference/ai_aging_simulation.yaml)
- **Servers:** `https://yce-api-01.makeupar.com`

## Authentication

| Name | Type | Scheme / Location | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| BearerAuthenticationV2 | http | bearer | Use the standard 'Bearer authentication'. Put your 'API Key' in header: `Authorization:Bearer YOUR_API_KEY`. Notice that there is ' ' a space between 'Bearer' and the 'YOUR_API_KEY'. |

## Endpoints

### `POST` `/s2s/v2.0/file/aging`
**Create a new file.**

To upload a new file, you'll first need to use the File API. It will give you a URL – use that URL to upload your file. Once the upload is finished, you can use the file_id from the same response to start using our AI features.

**Tags:** V1.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Request body

**application/json** · required

**Schema:** `FileV1.1`

This object represents a file.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `files` | `array<object>` | Yes | — |
| `files.content_type` | `string` | Yes | Content MIME type for this file. Currently available values are listed in the enum. |
| `files.file_name` | `string` | Yes | Name of this file |
| `files.file_size` | `integer` | Yes | Content length for this file in bytes. Should not be larger than 10MB. |

#### Responses

**200** — Successful retrieval of file upload information

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `BasicFileResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `files` | `array<object>` | No | — |
| `files.content_type` | `string` | No | Content MIME type for this file. |
| `files.file_name` | `string` | No | Name of this file |
| `files.file_id` | `string` | No | ID of this file. Other run task API will need this \`file_id\`. |
| `files.requests` | `array<object>` | No | Using upload \`url\`, \`headers\`, \`method\` below to upload file. After completion, the \`file_id\` is used to proceed with calling run task API. |
| `files.requests.headers` | `object` | No | Headers to include when uploading the file |
| `files.requests.url` | `string` | No | URL to upload this file |
| `files.requests.method` | `string` | No | HTTP method to upload this file |

**400** — Invalid request parameters

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |
| `error_code` | `string` | No | — |

**401** — Invalid or missing API key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |

### `POST` `/s2s/v2.0/task/aging`
**Run a AI Aging Generator task.**

This endpoint initiates the aging generation process. You must provide a source file (via URL or File ID). The task will be processed asynchronously, and you can check its status using the task_id returned in this response.

**Tags:** V1.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Request body

**application/json** · required

**Schema:** `RunAgingTask`

Represents a run AI Aging Generator task.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `request_id` | `integer` | Yes | Incremental request number starting from 0. Requests with the same `request_id` will be ignored by the server. `request_id` should remain the same if the API client needs to retry due to a connection issue. This is to prevent duplicate deduction of credits caused by running the same task repeatedly. For instance, if the same `file_id` is sent with the same `request_id`, the engine won't re-run the task, nor will duplicate consume credits. However, if a client wants to generate multiple different results using the same `file_id`, the client needs to increment the `request_id` then the engine will re-run the task and consume the credit accordingly. |
| `payload` | `object` | Yes | — |
| `payload.file_sets` | `object` | Yes | — |
| `payload.file_sets.src_ids` | `array<string>` | Yes | ID of file to apply aging style. File ID from upload file API. For aging task, only accept 1 file. |
| `payload.actions` | `array<object>` | Yes | Only accept 1 action. |
| `payload.actions.id` | `integer` | Yes | ID of this action, start with 0. The client needs to generate an `id` for each action. This action `id` has to be unique per task. In the response from the get status API, these action `id` will be used to let the client know which results correspond to each action. |
| `payload.output_ext` | `string — jpg` | No | The format of the output file. |

#### Responses

**200** — Successful execution of the AI Aging Generator task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `BasicRunTaskResponseV2`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `data` | `object` | No | — |
| `data.task_id` | `string` | No | ID of this task. Task result is valid to query by this ID for 24 hours. |

**400** — Failed execution of task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `RunError`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | Error message |
| `error_code` | `string — InvalidParameters \| CreditInsufficiency \| InvalidStyleGroup \| InvalidStyle \| BadRequest` | No | Error code:   * InvalidParameters - Invalid request parameters   * CreditInsufficiency - Insufficient unit to run   * BadRequest - Unexpected request parameter   * InvalidStyleGroup - Invalid style group id   * InvalidStyle - Invalid style id |

**401** — Invalid or missing API key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |

**429** — Too many requests

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |

### `GET` `/s2s/v2.0/task/aging/{task_id}`
**Check the status of a AI Aging Generator task.**

**Tags:** V1.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Parameters

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `task_id` | path | `string` | Yes | ID of task to check |

#### Responses

**200** — Successful check of the task status

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `AgingResponseV2`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `data` | `object` | No | — |
| `data.task_status` | `string — running \| success \| error` | No | Status of this task |
| `data.error` | `EngineErrorCode — error_exceed_max_image_size \| exceed_max_filesize \| invalid_parameter \| error_download_image \| error_download_mask \| error_decode_image \| error_decode_mask \| error_nsfw_content_detected \| error_no_face \| error_pose \| error_face_parsing \| error_inference \| exceed_nsfw_retry_limits \| error_upload \| unknown_internal_error \| null` | No | Errors: - \`error_exceed_max_image_size\`  - Input image size exceeds the maximum limit - \`exceed_max_filesize\` - Input file size exceeds the maximum limit - \`invalid_parameter\` - Invalid parameter value - \`error_download_image\` - Download source image error - \`error_download_mask\` - Download mask image error - \`error_decode_image\` - Decode source image error - \`error_decode_mask\` - Decode mask image error - \`error_nsfw_content_detected\` - NSFW content detected in source image - \`error_no_face\` - No face detected on source image - \`error_pose\` - Failed to detect pose on source image - \`error_face_parsing\` - Failed to do face segmentation on source image - \`error_inference\` - Inference pipeline error - \`exceed_nsfw_retry_limits\` - Exceed the retry limits to avoid generated NSFW image - \`error_upload\` - Upload result image error - \`unknown_internal_error\` - Others |
| `data.error_message` | `string` | No | Detailed description of error |
| `data.results` | `object` | No | — |
| `data.results.output` | `array<object>` | No | — |
| `data.results.age` | `integer` | No | Estimation of the age of the uploaded file by AI engine. Please be aware that the 'res_age' of the uploaded file, as found in the 'output' section, may not align with this 'age' value. |
| `data.results.agd_idx` | `integer` | No | Index of the uploaded file in the 'output'. Index is starting from 0. The first file has index 0, the second file has index 1, and so on. |
| `data.results.age_min` | `integer` | No | Minimum age among files in 'output' |
| `data.results.age_max` | `integer` | No | Maximum age among files in 'output' |
| `data.results.num_of_photos` | `integer` | No | Number of photos in 'output' |

**400** — Invalid task ID

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |

**401** — Invalid or missing API key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |

**500** — Task execution timeout

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |
